---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or enhancement for IOZEN
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Feature Description

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see in IOZEN.

## Motivation

Why would this feature be useful? What problem does it solve? How would it benefit IOZEN users?

## Proposed Syntax

If applicable, describe how the feature might look in IOZEN code:

```iozen
<!-- Example syntax for the proposed feature -->
```

## Alternatives Considered

Are there any existing workarounds or alternative approaches you've considered?

## Additional Context

Any other information that would help us understand and evaluate this request (e.g., links to relevant discussions, references to other languages, etc.).
